description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ruffled bib and graphic on the front  FittingComfortWash careWash separately with mild detergentDo not bleachDry flat in shadeDo not iron directly on print or embroideryDry clean preferredIndulge your little one in the spirit of spring in this vibrant red tee from ant.
